uplink._note: In-bounds synthetic input; expected.data authored from the normalized decode and cross-checked against reference/upstream-codec.js (Temp 27.8, Humi 53, Volt 2.8).

uplink.description: Temperature/humidity report, negative temp and 0% humidity (report type 0x01)
uplink._note: In-bounds synthetic input exercising two's-complement negative temperature (0xff38) and humidity lower bound 0; cross-checked against upstream (Temp -2, Humi 0).

uplink.description: Temperature/humidity report, humidity at 100% upper bound (report type 0x01)
uplink._note: In-bounds synthetic input with humidity byte 200 -> 100% (vocabulary percentage upper bound); cross-checked against upstream (Temp 2.5, Humi 100).

uplink.description: Temperature/humidity report with low-battery flag set (report type 0x01)
uplink._note: In-bounds synthetic input with battery byte high bit set; cross-checked against upstream (Volt '2.8(low battery)', Temp 30, Humi 25). Upstream conflates the flag into a string; we surface volts plus the camelCase extra lowBattery.

uplink.description: Combined temperature/humidity/illuminance report with alarm flags (report type 0x12)
uplink._note: In-bounds synthetic input; humidity is the 16-bit 0.01% field (0x1388 -> 50%, within 0-100 bound); cross-checked against upstream (Temp 30, Humidity '50%', Illuminance '200Lux', alarm bitmap 0x39).

uplink.description: Illuminance report with threshold-alarm flags, no temp/humidity (report type 0x02)
uplink._note: In-bounds synthetic input; cross-checked against upstream (Illuminance '2051Lux', alarm bitmap 0x39, Volt 2.8).

uplink.description: Startup/device-info frame carries no measurement (report type 0x00)
uplink._note: Report type 0x00 is a device-info frame; upstream emits Device/SWver/HWver/Datecode (no measurement), so we report an error.

uplink.description: Sensor enable/state snapshot carries no measurement (report type 0x11)
uplink._note: Report type 0x11 is a categorical sensor enable/state bitmap; upstream emits only boolean flags (no measurement).

uplink.description: Temperature/humidity report flagged as invalid reading (report type 0x01, bytes[5] bit0 clear)
uplink._note: bytes[5] bit0 is clear; upstream returns sentinel Temp '0xFFFF'/Humi '0xFF', so we report no measurement.

uplink.description: Config response on fPort 7 is unsupported
uplink._note: fPort 7 carries config command responses, not measurements; cross-checked against upstream (ConfigReportRsp).
